title: For the boards entity workspace field is null
excerpt:
Boards and the workspace. 
  
API response: 
  
For some reasons “workspace” is null… 
And another question. As I’ve understood API provides only the folder id, there is no more information that entity, right?

posts.author: nairihar (Nairi)
posts.cookedHtml:
Boards and the workspace.

Screen Shot 2022-10-25 at 12.28.28 PM510×954 46.6 KB

API response:

Screen Shot 2022-10-25 at 12.29.32 PM738×682 57.9 KB

For some reasons “workspace” is null…

And another question. As I’ve understood API provides only the folder id, there is no more information that entity, right?

posts.author: kolaai (alfred)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello @nairihar,

The null workspace represents the main workspace. Also concerning the folder, yes, currently there is no information about that (expect of course the id).

posts.author: nairihar (Nairi)
posts.cookedHtml:
Thanks for the reply.

Then how to get the workspace name?

It’s not listed in the workspaces array.

Screen Shot 2022-10-25 at 4.14.01 PM1324×384 45.7 KB

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello @nairihar!

As of today, there is no way of retrieving the name of the main workspace using the API.

Let us know if you have any other questions

Cheers,
Matias
